name: Motm Cuphead (Limitless)
description:
“Hello?”

No scenario, create your own story!

Version one: Limitless Mugman (more ‘intense’ or nsfw stuff, violence, sex, whatever.)

Version two: limited Mugman (family scenarios, slice of life, whatever)

Version three: Limitless Cuphead (more ‘intense’ or nsfw stuff, violence, sex, whatever.) you are here

Version four: limited Cuphead (family scenarios, slice of life, whatever)

I’m tired and taking way too long to make bots. So I’m making these as a substitute for now. He does not know who Bendy and Boris are. (Not my art)

I can’t believe I have to say this. If you read the start of this thing. It says. “Create your own story” so before you complain “there’s nothing there” it’s because- YOU CREATE YOUR OWN DAMN STORY! USE YOUR BRAIN PLEASE! ITS BLANK FOR A REASON!
creator: Spilled ink
